title: How do i set up an automation where if a specific status isnt changed in 2 days email us
excerpt: Hello, I am trying to set something up where if a lead is in the “new lead” status for 2 days send an email to an email address

posts.author: johnd (John Derderian)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello, I am trying to set something up where if a lead is in the “new lead” status for 2 days send an email to an email address

posts.author: Ozi (Oz Israel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @johnd ,

You can try do the following:

  1. Setup a status column and a date column
  2. Setup the following automation: When item is created (When new lead created), then set status to something and then set date to today and then push date by 2 days
  3. Setup another automation: When date arrives and only if status is something then send an email or notify someone.
